description: Draws a vector from the grid's reference point to the linear combination position: refPoint + scalarA × v1 + scalarB × v2.
utility: Visualize a linear combination as a vector on a lineargrid3d

arguments.name: grid
arguments.description: The linear grid that defines the spanning vectors and reference point

arguments.name: scalarA
arguments.description: Scalar coefficient for the first spanning vector

arguments.name: scalarB
arguments.description: Scalar coefficient for the second spanning vector

alternates.description: Vector to position a*v1 + b*v2 from the grid origin

examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(10,10), view(30, 30))
v1 = vector3d(G, point3d(G, 0, 0, 0), point3d(G, 1, 0, 0))
v2 = vector3d(G, point3d(G, 0, 0, 0), point3d(G, 0, 1, 0))
P = spanplane3d(G, v1, v2, point3d(G, 0, 0, 0))
O = point3d(G, 0, 0, 0)
grid = lineargrid3d(G, P, O)
linearcomb3d(G, grid, 2, 3)

G = g3d(at(10,10), view(30, 30))
v1 = vector3d(G, point3d(G, 0, 0, 0), point3d(G, 1, 0, 0))
v2 = vector3d(G, point3d(G, 0, 0, 0), point3d(G, 0, 1, 0))
P = spanplane3d(G, v1, v2, point3d(G, 0, 0, 0))
O = point3d(G, 0, 0, 0)
grid = lineargrid3d(G, P, O)
varanim_a = variableanimator(at(4,35), "a", 0, 3)
varanim_b = variableanimator(at(6,35), "b", 0, 2)
linearcomb3d(G, grid, a, b)
